hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(--no-verify|--no-gpg-sign)"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PreToolUse\", \"permissionDecision\": \"deny\", \"permissionDecisionReason\": \"Blocked: --no-verify and --no-gpg-sign are not allowed. Fix the underlying issue instead.\"}}"; fi'
